_note: Edit this file directly. The app reads it on startup and syncs to storage. Do NOT add claudeApiKey or linkedinPassword here — set those in Settings.

workExperience.title: Software Engineering Intern
bullets: Designed and refined AI-powered data extraction models for multiple $10B+ AUM wealth management firms, achieving 100% accuracy on validated document extraction benchmarks
Built internal admin dashboard interfaces for model monitoring and operational workflows
Ran model evaluation pipelines and performance analyses, iteratively improving model accuracy and reliability

workExperience.title: Software Engineer Intern
bullets: Shipped education management software used in 60+ schools, supporting nationwide turn-key after-school programs

Maintained the full stack (React Native mobile app + Node.js/TypeScript backend + PostgreSQL/Redis) for a staffing system connecting 300+ substitute teachers with real-time shift requests, teacher availability and curriculum updates

workExperience.title: Full Stack Engineering Intern
bullets: Built a responsive React dashboard powered by Plotly.js that translated complex datasets into real-time visual insights
Developed scalable frontend architecture (Context + useReducer) with client-side caching and integrated secure Flask/BigQuery APIs for reliable data delivery

workExperience.company: UC Santa Cruz Baskin School of Engineering
workExperience.title: Software Engineering Intern
bullets: Co-authored a working paper with faculty mentor (Frontiers Research); prototyped interactive systems in Unity (C#)
Instrumented telemetry surveys to study UX patterns for acculturative behavior among Latinx players
Built a cooperative cooking game exploring machismo dynamics; iterated through usability testing and heuristic evaluations

workExperience.title: Tech Lead
bullets: Mentor a 5-person AI Investor Startup connection board; lead code reviews, sprint planning, and demo readiness
Ship hands-on sessions covering LLM patterns, basic ML, and API integration; maintain starter repos to accelerate project setup

projects.name: CivicSpeech — Presidential Speech Analytics
bullets: Scraped UVA's Presidential speech archive with Selenium + BeautifulSoup, normalizing metadata into an SQLite3 schema (speeches, recordings, metrics)
Processed 3,064+ audio recordings speech-to-text via an ASR and Selenium pipeline
Computed readability features via Gunning Fog index; trained Random Forest, Clustering, and Linear Regression models in scikit-learn to model text-complexity scores across administrations

projects.name: Frame Her — Semantic Video Search Engine
bullets: Built vector-based retrieval that indexes video frames by visual content using OpenCLIP and Ultralytics object detection
Stored embeddings and frame samples in SQLite3 and performed cosine-similarity search for top-k retrieval

narrative.professionalSummary: CS & Economics student at NYU (GPA 3.8, graduating May 2027) with internship experience in full-stack development, AI/ML, and data engineering. Currently building AI-powered data extraction models at Lea Technologies. Strong in React, Python, TypeScript, and Node.js with production experience shipping systems used by thousands of users.
